title: garcinia polyneura
intro: Garcinia polyneura is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the mangosteen family. It is native to Borneo and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of xanthones, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Garcinia polyneura include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Traditionally, Garcinia polyneura is prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties.
